message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first export_jsonl in ft export command (tick 250)

Migrates the two production callers of `export::export_jsonl` in
`frankenterm/main.rs` to the cx-first sibling `export_jsonl_with_cx`:

- Import line updated: `export_jsonl` → `export_jsonl_with_cx`
- L30845 (file output path) and L30849 (stdout buffer path) both invoke
  `export_jsonl_with_cx(&export_cx, &storage, &opts, &mut ...)` where
  `export_cx` resolves via `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)`

The `_with_cx` variant threads the Cx through every internal storage
query (`export_segments_with_cx`, `get_events_with_cx`,
`export_workflows_with_cx`, `get_step_logs_with_cx`,
`get_audit_actions_with_cx`, `export_reservations_with_cx`) and emits
an initial `cx.checkpoint()` before any I/O — so a cx-cancel at the CLI
spawn boundary now cleanly aborts a running `ft export` mid-stream rather
than running the full query chain before unwinding.

Both production paths of the `ft export` command (file-output + stdout
buffer) now route through the cx-first pipeline. The legacy ambient
`export_jsonl` is retained in `export.rs` only for the ~25 test-mod
callers in `export.rs` itself and `tests/export_labruntime.rs` — those
run in LabRuntime harnesses where Cx-cancel semantics are tested via the
`_with_cx` variant directly (tick 740-era test).

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 64 (187-250).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 125 sites (123 before + 2).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
